questionText: Does your organization have a board of directors or an equivalent governing body?
questionKo: 조직에 이사회 또는 이에 상응하는 감독기구가 있습니까 ?
issueTags: Water, Ocean, Biodiversity, Climate Change, Forests
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: This question provides context to data users on board composition and diversity, which have been found to correlate with performance on environmental issues.

columns.text: Board of directors or equivalent governing body
Frequency with which the board or equivalent meets
Types of directors your board or equivalent is comprised of

options: Yes, and it is publicly available
Yes, but it is not publicly available

columns.text: Briefly describe what the policy covers

guidance.text:
Board of directors or equivalent governing body (column 1) 
Select "Yes" if your organization has a board or an equivalent body that provides long-term governance over your organization with key functions such as establishing strategy and organizational purpose. 
If your organization has two-tier board system, select "Yes" and answer this question with respect to your board structure as a whole.
Frequency with which the board or equivalent meets (column 2) 
Select the frequency with which the board or equivalent governing body meets. If the board or equivalent meets at a frequency that is not listed in the drop-down options, select the closest match for your organization. 
If your organization has two-tier board system, select the frequency of the board that meets more frequently. E.g., if the management board meets quarterly, but the supervisory board meets half-yearly, select "Quarterly". 
Types of directors your board or equivalent is comprised of (column 3) 
See the "Explanation of terms" for the definitions of executive directors, non-executive directors, and independent non-executive directors. 
If your organization does not have board directors, select the options which best represent the members of your equivalent governing body with respect to their involvement in the day-to-day management of your organization. 
Board diversity and inclusion policy (column 4) 
Select either "Yes" option if your organization has a diversity and inclusion policy that outlines how the organization will achieve diversity on the board or equivalent governing body. See "Explanation of terms" for more information. 
Briefly describe what the policy covers (column 5) 
This column is presented if either "Yes, and it is publicly available", or "Yes, but it is not publicly available" is selected in column 4 "Board diversity and inclusion policy". 
Attach the policy (optional) (column 6) 
This column is presented if either "Yes, and it is publicly available", or "Yes, but it is not publicly available" is selected in column 4 "Board diversity and inclusion policy". 
You may attach one or more documents which include your organization's diversity and inclusion policy.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 위 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text:
The board includes an appropriate combination of executive, non-executive and, in particular, independent directors. 
The organization has a publicly available board diversity and inclusion policy.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
Board: (also referred to as "Board of Directors") a body of elected or appointed members who jointly oversee the activities of a company or organization. Some countries/areas use a two-tiered system, with a "supervisory board" and a separate "management board". 
Board diversity: variation amongst board members such as in age, gender, geography, education, ethnicity, and professional background.
Executive director : a board member who is actively involved in the day-to-day management of the organization ( CIPD, 2023 ).
Independent non-executive director : a member of the board who is not employed by the organization they are a director of, and who is not involved in the day-to-day running of the organization and does not represent any major shareholders. They are responsible for providing independent advice and oversight to the board of directors (adapted from CIPD, 2023 ).
Non-executive director : a board member who is not involved in the day-to-day management of the organization but may have links to the organization such as representing a major shareholder (adapted from CIPD, 2023 ).
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항에서 사용하는 주요 용어의 의미를 설명합니다. 용어 해석은 CDP 2026 원문과 국문 양식의 용어 사용을 우선 적용하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed (excluding column 'Attach the policy (optional)').
A maximum of 5/5 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Board of directors or equivalent governing body' NOT completed - 0/19 points
A maximum of 0/19 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
ROUTE A)
'Yes' selected in column 'Board of directors or equivalent governing body' AND
Either 'Yes, and it is publicly available' OR 'Yes, but it is not publicly available' selected in column 'Board diversity and inclusion policy' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No' selected in column 'Board of directors or equivalent governing body' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Board of directors or equivalent governing body' NOT completed - 0/5 points
A maximum of 0/5 points is available for this route.

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026
sourceInfo.nameKo: CDP 2026 전체 기업 문항 및 보고 가이던스

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

issueTagsKo: 수자원, 해양, 생물다양성, 기후 변경, 산림
sectorTagsKo: 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, 식품, 음료 & 담배, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '조직에 이사회 또는 이에 상응하는 감독기구가 있습니까?'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
translationSourceKo: CDP 국문 양식 기반 국문 보정
listTitleEn: Does your organization have a board of directors or an equivalent governing body?
listTitleKo: 조직에 이사회 또는 이에 상응하는 감독기구가 있습니까 ?
